text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today, <chrname> and the other<n>students have
gone on a field trip to<n>observe a race.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The academy is void of students and<n>completely
silent... or so I thought... I<n>hear faint groaning
sounds from<n>nearby.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... Gurrrggh! Where have my<n>precious
Umas gone?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right... I'm Agnes Zombie<n>Digital, and I'm
starving for Umas!
choice_data_list: I thought all the students went to watch the race...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Poor wittle me! I've been out sick<n>with a cold for
the past few days...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I forcibly expelled that plague<n>from my
system because I was<n>craving a sweet, sweet
glimpse of<n>some glorious Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But what's this?! There's not even a<n>WHIFF of
an Uma around! I can't<n>believe I forgot there was
a field trip<n>today! Curses! What a fool I am!
choice_data_list: You should go home and rest.
You can still make it, though!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Guehehehe... Yeees, you are<n>so right. It's
not like I'll be able to find<n>any sustenance at the
academy<n>anyway...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second! You! Got any top-tier<n>insider
stories about the Uma you're<n>partnered with?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I worked so hard to drag myself out<n>here! The
least you could do is bless<n>me with some good
stuff! Nourish my<n>poor, shriveled-up heart!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it's "top-tier" or<n>anything, but I tell
her a story about<n>what happened to <chrname>
during<n>training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ohoho... Thank youfor the food... I'm calling it quits today,but I'll come back tomorrow toworship my lovely Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list:
You should be fine as long as you complete the
late-arrival procedure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
ASDFSLKSF?! Are you some kind of<n>god?! What
are we waiting for?! Let's<n>go now! To the
paradise of my<n>dreeeaaams!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can calm down<n>Agnes Digital
when she's like this, so<n>I help complete her
late-arrival<n>paperwork and take her to the venue.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Can you blame me?! Even if the<n>members and
venue are the same, no<n>two shows are exactly
alike!<n>Besides...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The feelings that your oshi gives you<n>are on a
completely different level!<n>It's why otaku literally
go to every<n>performance they can!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, my journey continues! I<n>must seek
out the best spot I can in<n>order to worship my
favorite Uma with<n>my whole heart!
